name: postal
tagline: A self-hosted mail delivery platform for sending and managing email at scale
description: Postal is a self-hosted mail delivery platform designed for sending and managing large volumes of email. It supports SMTP, webhooks, message logging, and domain management with full control over infrastructure.

features.title: Email Server
features.description: Send and receive email for hosted domains

features.title: SMTP and HTTP APIs
features.description: Deliver email using SMTP and HTTP interfaces

features.title: Domain Management
features.description: Configure and manage multiple sending domains

features.title: Message Tracking
features.description: View delivery status and message logs

features.title: Self-Hosted Deployment
features.description: Run the mail server on your own infrastructure
